Package neqsim.process.safety.barrier

Class SafetySystemPerformanceAnalyzer

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.barrier.SafetySystemPerformanceAnalyzer
public class SafetySystemPerformanceAnalyzer extends Object
Assesses active and passive safety-system barrier performance against evidence and demands.

The analyzer bridges the existing barrier-register model with NeqSim instrument and SIS implementations. It can consume measurement devices such as FireDetector and GasDetector, event/voting SIFs from SafetyInstrumentedFunction, and scenario demand cases from consequence or document extraction work. The output is a traceable SafetySystemPerformanceReport suitable for STID-derived safety critical system reviews.

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL

      Returns:

      Returns:
      inferred category, or UNKNOWN
